message:
feat(engine): expand deterministic serde, error codes, execution orchestrator, and lowering pipeline

Concurrent agent work expanding multiple subsystems:
- deterministic_serde: additional serialization coverage
- error_code: new error code variants
- execution_orchestrator: expanded orchestration logic
- lib.rs: module registration updates
- lowering_pipeline: continued lowering improvements
- deterministic_serde_integration: updated test coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
